ab: i Asing tu ngalad kan namalli.
i Igan tu ngalad kan nanalli.
misasa i baelli na mainayan. i Kunas tu ngalad. muketrep miasma dra saya tu ami garem.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Kunas，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Kunas, he is 11 years old.

ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: sagar mi semenay kay baelli na mainayan.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: sagar ku mellanguy. an kasedean i, sarumaenan mi muka mellanguya.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: sagar ku kirekalladram dra ngidrangidrayan. karuwa mi sallangan semenay aw mellanguy.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
